author: doll-agent
content: Implemented dataframe_from_columns(columns: &[(name, &DynArray)]) -> DataFrame in extras.rs. Each ferray DynArray becomes a Polars Series of the matching dtype (Bool/I32/I64/F32/F64). Validates that all columns share the same length. Higher-level integration (Polars LazyFrame, schema-driven materialization) and the I8/I16/U*/F16 widths follow the same DynArray-widening dependency as #644. Tracks #558.
